headline: The Nationwide Social Security Survey Says Most Americans Are Flying Blind on Benefits, Here’s the Income Strategy That Fills the Gap
summary: A new Nationwide Retirement Institute survey paints a stark picture: most Americans approaching retirement do not actually understand the program they are banking on. Only 21% of respondents correctly identified their full retirement age based on their year of birth, and the average adult answered just 8 of 15 true-or-false questions about Social Security correctly. ... The Nationwide Social Security Survey Says Most Americans Are Flying Blind on Benefits, Here’s the Income Strategy That Fills t

headline: Nationwide Survey: 83% of Americans Are Worried Social Security Won’t Survive, and Here’s What to Do About It
summary: The fear is loud, and the data backs it up. According to the Nationwide Retirement Institute’s 2025 Social Security Survey, 83% of Americans currently receiving or expecting to receive Social Security are concerned about the program’s future. That worry is not happening in a vacuum. The Social Security Administration’s own trustees project that the Old-Age ... headline: Warren Buffett and Berkshire Hathaway Own 2 Dividend Kings That Will Never Be Sold
summary: Warren Buffett stepped down as CEO of Berkshire Hathaway (BRK-B) on December 31, 2025, after six decades leading the conglomerate he transformed from a struggling textile mill into a $1 trillion empire. The “Oracle of Omaha” left his successor, Greg Abel, with a very concentrated portfolio: more than 65% of Berkshire’s $381 billion portfolio is ...
